case_title: BEATRIZ RIVAS VS. RT MAHAN INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVAS, BEATRIZ AS TO DEFENDANT RT MAHAN INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
